title: Bitcoin (BTC) News: Saylor Says Strategy Will Buy 20x More Bitcoin Than It Sells
description: For five years, Michael Saylor had one rule on Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC)—never sell. The rule built Strategy itself, his personal brand, and the entire reason shareholders bought the company’s MSTR stock. Then, on May 5, Saylor told analysts on the Q1 earnings call that the company might sell some Bitcoin to fund dividends. Days later, ... Bitcoin (BTC) News: Saylor Says Strategy Will Buy 20x More Bitcoin Than It Sells
